PreToolUse.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.description: TypeScript/JavaScript: Format and lint after write
PostToolUse.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.description: Python: Format and lint after write
PostToolUse.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostCommit.command: echo '✅ Commit completed. Consider running tests to verify changes.'
